2606.22488.title: SCOPE: Evolving Symbolic World for Planning in Open-Ended Environments
2606.22488.paper_summary: Recent works have explored integrating Vision-Language Models (VLMs) with classical planners that rely on symbolic representations of planning problems to generate long-horizon plans for complex embodied tasks. However, in open-ended environments, these symbolic representations obtained from perception are often incomplete, leading to suboptimal performance. To address this, we introduce SCOPE, a self-adaptive symbolic planning framework that supports refining action plans and evolving the symbolic world, i.e., the symbolic representations of open-ended environments. SCOPE comprises two synergistic modules: a Symbolic Execution Simulator (SESim) that conducts symbolic validation and real execution of action plans, leveraging the feedback to refine the plans and evolve the symbolic world; and a Self-Adaptive Symbolic Memory (SASMem) that further distills feedback into evolving symbolic knowledge to enhance long-horizon planning and modeling of the symbolic world. Experiments in open-ended environments show that SCOPE significantly improves the completeness of the symbolic world, the success rate of plans under environment perturbations, and cross-task grounding and adaptability across diverse embodied scenarios.
2606.22488.paper_summary_zh: 最近的研究探討了將視覺-語言模型（VLMs）與依賴於計畫問題的符號表示的傳統規劃器整合，以生成複雜具身任務的長期計畫。<lb/>然而，在開放式環境中，從感知獲得的這些符號表示通常是不完整的，導致次優的表現。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們介紹了SCOPE，一個自適應的符號規劃框架，支持精煉行動計畫並演變符號世界，即開放式環境的符號表示。<lb/>SCOPE包含兩個協同模組：一個符號執行模擬器（SESim），進行行動計畫的符號驗證和實際執行，利用反饋來精煉計畫並演變符號世界；以及一個自適應符號記憶（SASMem），進一步將反饋提煉為演變的符號知識，以增強長期計畫和符號世界的建模。<lb/>在開放式環境中的實驗顯示，SCOPE顯著提高了符號世界的完整性、在環境擾動下計畫的成功率，以及在多樣化具身場景中的跨任務基礎和適應能力。
2606.22488.author: Yundaichuan Zhan et.al.
2606.22488.authors: Yundaichuan Zhan, Minghe Gao, Zhongqi Yue, Wendong Bu, Wenqiao Zhang, Guoming Wang, Jisheng Dang, Juncheng Li, Siliang Tang, Yueting Zhuang
